hero.headline: Learn to Code, Build the Future
hero.subtitle: Empowering the next generation of tech innovators
hero.description: Join Akava IT Academy and discover the exciting world of programming. Our interactive courses are designed specifically for children aged 8-16, making learning fun and engaging.

features.title: Why Choose Akava Academy?
features.desc: We combine cutting-edge technology with proven educational methods to create an engaging learning experience that prepares children for the digital future.
features.cta: Ready to Start Your Coding Journey?

courses.title: Explore Our Courses
courses.desc: From beginner to advanced, our courses are designed to grow with your child's programming skills and interests.
courses.notSure: Not Sure Which Course to Choose?

quiz.title: Find the Perfect Course
quiz.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions and we'll recommend the best course based on age, interests, and goals
quiz.question: Question
quiz.tip: Tip: You can sign up for a free trial lesson to see if this is the best choice!

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.desc: Ready to start your child's coding journey? Contact us today for a free consultation and discover how Akava Academy can help shape their future.
contact.received: We've received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.description: Empowering the next generation of tech innovators through interactive, project-based learning. Join thousands of students discovering the joy of programming at Akava Academy.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get the latest updates on new courses, student success stories, and coding tips.
